title: 计算能力的巨大转变
description: 英特尔历史性飙升的背后，是AI算力的主导地位正在从单一走向多元化。
titleZh: 计算能力的巨大转变
titleEn: The Great Shift in Computing Power
descriptionZh: 英特尔历史性飙升的背后，是AI算力的主导地位正在从单一走向多元化。
descriptionEn: Behind Intel’s historic surge, the dominance of AI computing power is moving from singularity to diversity.

title: 谷歌售价 200 美元的人工智能动态图表功能，现在对 Claude 免费
description: Anthropic刚刚为Claude添加了一个“白板”，允许在对话中直接生成交互式图表和流程图，并且每个可点击的点都可以扩展。
titleZh: 谷歌售价 200 美元的人工智能动态图表功能，现在对 Claude 免费
titleEn: Google’s $200 AI Dynamic Chart Feature, Now Free with Claude
descriptionZh: Anthropic刚刚为Claude添加了一个“白板”，允许在对话中直接生成交互式图表和流程图，并且每个可点击的点都可以扩展。
descriptionEn: Anthropic just added a "whiteboard" to Claude, allowing interactive charts and flowcharts to be generated directly in conversations, with every clickable point expandable. Coincidentally, OpenAI launched a similar feature two days ago, and Google had already made a move last year. All three are betting on the same thing: It’s not enough to just talk—AI must learn to "draw it for you."

title: OpenAI，各方危机
description: 奥特曼亲手杀掉了索拉和科学部，清理了一波“支线任务”，最终成功释放了GPT-5.5。
titleZh: OpenAI，各方危机
titleEn: OpenAI, Crisis on All Sides
descriptionZh: 奥特曼亲手杀掉了索拉和科学部，清理了一波“支线任务”，最终成功释放了GPT-5.5。
descriptionEn: Altman personally killed off Sora and the Science Division, purged a wave of "side quests," and finally succeeded in releasing GPT-5.5. Yet, facing Anthropic’s revenue overtake and a massive internal leadership shakeup, is this all-or-nothing IPO gamble a return to glory or a final elegy?

title: 被AI陷害入狱160天的美国女子冲上杀戮线

titleZh: 被AI陷害入狱160天的美国女子冲上杀戮线

descriptionZh: 找一位人工智能律师。
descriptionEn: Get an AI lawyer.

title: 代币挖矿疯狂：Meta 员工利用机器人作弊攀登排行榜，一个月烧掉 200 万美元
description: Meta内部推出了一个名为“Claudeonomics”的AI使用排行榜，85,000名员工在此竞争消费、排名，争夺“Token Legend”称号。
titleZh: 代币挖矿疯狂：Meta 员工利用机器人作弊攀登排行榜，一个月烧掉 200 万美元
titleEn: Token Farming Gone Wild: Meta Employee Cheats with Bots to Climb the Leaderboard, Burning $2 Million in a Month
descriptionZh: Meta内部推出了一个名为“Claudeonomics”的AI使用排行榜，85,000名员工在此竞争消费、排名，争夺“Token Legend”称号。
descriptionEn: Meta internally launched an AI usage leaderboard called "Claudeonomics," where 85,000 employees compete on consumption, rank up, and vie for the "Token Legend" title. One person burned $2 million in a month, another wrote bots to cheat the rankings, and someone left an Agent running while sleeping—Silicon Valley’s token grind has spiraled into obsession.

title: Epoch AI 万人调查：如果老板不订阅，AI 只是个摆设
description: Epoch AI 的最新调查：上周有一半的美国成年人使用了人工智能，但真正的分界线不是技术，而是谁付费。
titleZh: Epoch AI 万人调查：如果老板不订阅，AI 只是个摆设
titleEn: Epoch AI Survey of 10,000: If the Boss Doesn’t Subscribe, AI Is Just a Decoration
descriptionZh: Epoch AI 的最新调查：上周有一半的美国成年人使用了人工智能，但真正的分界线不是技术，而是谁付费。
descriptionEn: Epoch AI’s latest survey: Half of American adults used AI last week, but the real dividing line isn’t technology—it’s who pays. The moment the company foots the bill, AI work usage jumps from 38% to 76%.

title: 马斯克 vs 奥特曼：终极审判——不是 1870 亿美元，就把 OpenAI 还给我
description: 4 月 27 日，马斯克将就一场长达十年的纠纷将他的前合伙人奥特曼告上法庭。
titleZh: 马斯克 vs 奥特曼：终极审判——不是 1870 亿美元，就把 OpenAI 还给我
titleEn: Musk vs. Altman: The Ultimate Trial—Not $187 Billion, Just Give OpenAI Back to Me
descriptionZh: 4 月 27 日，马斯克将就一场长达十年的纠纷将他的前合伙人奥特曼告上法庭。
descriptionEn: On April 27, Musk will take his former partner Altman to court over a decade-old dispute. He doesn’t want money—he just wants OpenAI to return to 2015. This trial could directly block OpenAI’s IPO path.

title: 谷歌投降？
description: 谷歌正在向 Anthropic 投入 400 亿美元，这个“敌人”与自己的 Gemini 正面竞争。
titleZh: 谷歌投降？
titleEn: Google Surrenders? $40 Billion Poured into Its Archrival, the AI Big Three Ends, OpenAI Left Isolated
descriptionZh: 谷歌正在向 Anthropic 投入 400 亿美元，这个“敌人”与自己的 Gemini 正面竞争。
descriptionEn: Google is pouring $40 billion into Anthropic, the "enemy" competing head-on with its own Gemini. As Claude’s annualized revenue skyrockets 30-fold in a year to $30 billion, and computing power becomes the only hard currency in AI’s second half, rather than fighting Gemini head-on, it’s better to turn the rival into TPU’s biggest customer.

title: Anthropic 的实验火爆：Claude 为人类做了 186 笔交易，Opus 用户收入增加了 70%
description: Anthropic有69名员工将交易权限交给Claude，发现强模型代理人在交易中可以比弱模型代理人多赚70%，Opus用户毫不费力地收割Haiku用户。
titleZh: Anthropic 的实验火爆：Claude 为人类做了 186 笔交易，Opus 用户收入增加了 70%
titleEn: Anthropic’s Experiment Goes Viral: Claude Made 186 Deals for Humans, Opus Users Earn 70% More
descriptionZh: Anthropic有69名员工将交易权限交给Claude，发现强模型代理人在交易中可以比弱模型代理人多赚70%，Opus用户毫不费力地收割Haiku用户。
descriptionEn: Anthropic had 69 employees hand over their trading authority to Claude, and found that strong-model agents could earn 70% more than weak-model ones in transactions, with Opus users effortlessly harvesting Haiku users. No matter how beautifully you craft prompts to teach an agent to haggle, absolute model disparity leaves you utterly outclassed.
